body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `IntervalSets` package from `0.5, 0.6` to `0.5, 0.6, 0.7`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for IntervalSets to 0.7, (keep existing compat)

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `DocStringExtensions` package from `0.8` to `0.8, 0.9`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for DocStringExtensions to 0.9, (keep existing compat)
